name: Chocolate Chip Cookies (Chefs Cuisiniers Club
recipeIngredient: 1 cup + 2 tablespoons firmly packed brown sugar
3 cups Semisweet chocolate chips (or chocolate chunks about 1 pound)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, sift together flour, baking soda, and salt.
3. Scrape vanilla bean seeds from pods into a standing electric mixer; reserve pods for another use if desired. Add butter and sugars, beating until light and fluffy.
4. Beat in eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Beat in vanilla extract.
5. Gradually add flour mixture to the dough, mixing only until combined. Stir in chocolate chips or chunks and walnuts (do not overmix).
6. Form dough into 1 1/2 inch balls and arrange about 2 inches apart on parchment-lined baking sheets.
7. Flatten each ball slightly with a metal spatula.
8. Bake cookies in batches in the middle of the oven for 12 to 15 minutes, or until golden brown.
9. Using a spatula, transfer cookies to racks to cool.
